creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 146759
patch to upgrade editors/openoffice-devel to SVN revision 1622136 (4.2.0 AOO420m1 (Build 9800)) with Makefile and patch cleanups

The openoffice-4 port has been upgraded to the official 4.1.1 release, so there
is no sense upgrading the openoffice-devel port to 4.1.1-RC3.  Instead, upgrade to SVN revision 1622137 (4.2.0 AOO420m1 (Build 9800)).
